combat.title: Combat
combat.surrenderConfirm: Are you sure? You will be at the mercy of your enemies.
combat.forceTruceConfirm: You have the upper hand. Force a truce? Remaining enemies will back down.
combat.youForcedTruceAfterRounds: You forced a truce after {{rounds}} rounds.
combat.chatCriticalHit: {{actor}} lands a critical hit on {{target}} — {{damage}} damage ({{location}})
combat.playerDied: Your character has fallen in combat
combat.playerDiedDesc: Death is final. Your journey ends here.
combat.spectatorDesc: You are now spectating. Your character is dead and cannot take any more actions.
combat.customAttackPlaceholder: Describe how you strike to earn a creativity bonus to the roll.
combat.customAttackHint: A richer, more tactical description can improve your chance to hit.
combat.outOfRange: Target too far for melee. Move closer or use Charge.

imageConfig.title: Image Configuration
imageConfig.subtitle: Configure how scenes are displayed, the art style and the image generation provider.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Test image generation: type keywords and use the wand to let AI build a full prompt from your settings, or write the prompt manually.
playground.keywordsPlaceholder: e.g. dwarven blacksmith, night forge, embers
playground.promptPlaceholder: The full prompt will appear here — feel free to edit it before generating.
playground.imageUnsupported: The selected provider does not support a reference image.
playground.noProviderKey: Selected image provider key is missing.
playground.noAiKey: Selected text AI provider key is missing.

keys.title: Model Configuration
keys.subtitle: Configure model preferences. AI provider keys are read from the server's environment variables.
keys.envHint: Keys are read only from the server's environment variables (`.env` file). They cannot be set from the UI.
keys.providerUnavailable: Missing {{envVar}} in the server's environment variables
keys.configureElevenlabs: ElevenLabs narration requires a backend connection and an `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` environment variable on the server.
keys.configureSuno: Set your Suno API key in the Keys panel to generate music.

lobby.title: Dungeons & Sillicons
lobby.subtitle: Begin your solo RPG adventure. An AI Dungeon Master awaits to guide you through realms of your own making.
lobby.apiKeyDescription: Configure your OpenAI or Anthropic API key in Settings to start playing.
lobby.noCampaigns: No campaigns yet. Start a new adventure!
lobby.rejoinDescription: You were disconnected from a multiplayer game. Rejoin to continue playing.
lobby.loginSubtitle: Connect to a server to sync campaigns, characters and settings.
lobby.loginOnMainPage: Log in on the main page
lobby.forkFromSceneHint: Pick a scene to branch into a new campaign copy
lobby.characterChoiceDesc: Choose which character version to use
lobby.campaignNotFound: Campaign not found. It may have been deleted.

creator.title: Forge a New Campaign
creator.subtitle: Define the parameters of your adventure. The AI Dungeon Master will craft a unique world tailored to your vision.
creator.careerClassHint: Leave as "Any" to let the AI choose a career fitting the story.
creator.characterNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to let the AI suggest a name...
creator.storyPromptLabel: What should the story be about?
creator.storyPlaceholder: A lone wanderer discovers an ancient artifact that grants the power to reshape reality, but each use erases a memory...
creator.generatePromptFromInput: Generate a topic from the entered text
creator.loadingTitle: The Grimoire stirs... crafting your world
creator.loadingDescription: The AI is generating your campaign world, story hook, character, and opening scene. This may take a moment.
creator.noApiKeyHint: Configure an API key in Settings before creating a campaign.
creator.noCharacterHint: Create or select a character before starting the campaign.

gameplay.customActionPlaceholderVoice: Describe your action or click the mic...
gameplay.dialogueHint: Text in "quotes" will be spoken by your character
gameplay.searchForQuestsAction: I look around for available work, quests, or tasks — I ask locals, check notice boards, and listen for rumors
gameplay.continueDisabledTooltip: You cannot pick “Continue” twice in a row. Choose another action or “Wait”.
gameplay.waitSystemMessage: I wait and see what happens next.
gameplay.restAction: We find a safe place to set up camp and rest for the night — the party eats supper, drinks, washes, attends to all needs, and sleeps until morning
gameplay.contextDepthTooltip: How much story context to send to AI. 100% = full history, NPCs, quests, knowledge. Lower = faster and cheaper responses, but AI remembers less.
gameplay.summaryLoadingBackground: First part is ready. Loading next batches in the background...
gameplay.summaryEmpty: Click generate to create a summary for this part of the story.
gameplay.summaryEmptyGenerated: AI returned an empty summary. Try again.
gameplay.summaryReadAloudUnavailable: Could not start voice playback. Check narrator settings.
gameplay.summaryReadAloudFallback: Narrator is unavailable right now, so browser voice was used.
gameplay.summaryElevenlabsOnly: Summary playback is ElevenLabs-only. Configure narrator and voice settings.

chat.awaitingFirstMove: The DM awaits your first move...

character.noActiveDescription: Start or load a campaign to view your character sheet.
character.libraryDescription: Browse saved characters from your campaigns.
character.noSavedCharacters: No saved characters. Play a campaign to save characters.
character.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this character?
character.originsEmpty: The origins of this adventurer remain shrouded in mystery...
character.historyEmpty: No history yet — start playing to see a summary.

quests.selectQuest: Select a quest to view details
quests.returnToNpc: Return to {{npc}} to complete this quest
quests.hiddenObjectives: More objectives will be revealed as you progress...

inventory.title: Armory & Artifacts
inventory.crystalModalDesc: Choose what to improve. The effect is permanent and consumes the crystal.

settings.localLLMDesc: Connect to a locally running LLM via Ollama or LM Studio for offline play.
settings.title: Dungeon Master Settings
settings.subtitle: Calibrate the arcane engine. Your choices here will reshape the narrative fabric of the realm.
settings.llmPremiumTimeoutDesc: Max wait for premium model response (scene). On timeout the pipeline emits an LLM_TIMEOUT error. Default 45s.
settings.llmNanoTimeoutDesc: Max wait for nano model responses (intent, compression, quests). On timeout the pipeline falls back. Default 15s.
settings.storyChaosDesc: The entropy of AI plot twists
settings.responseLengthDesc: How verbose the DM's narration is
settings.skillChecksDesc: How often dice rolls are required
settings.combatCommentaryFrequencyDesc: How often the AI adds a mid-combat commentary. Set to 0 to disable battle comments entirely.
settings.playerFreedomDesc: How much the AI follows vs leads the story
settings.sceneVisualizationDesc: How scenes are displayed during gameplay
settings.meshySettingsDesc: Generate 3D models on demand via Meshy.ai API
settings.meshyEnabledDesc: When off, 3D mode uses placeholder geometry only
settings.clearAssetCacheDesc: Remove all cached 3D models from browser storage
settings.gptImageLabel: GPT Image 1.5 (OpenAI) — best quality, reference photos
settings.sdWebuiOffline: Stable Diffusion WebUI is unreachable. Check SD_WEBUI_URL and make sure A1111 runs with --api.
settings.sdWebuiSeedHint: Double-click the field to toggle between random (new seed each time) and manual (same seed → same image).
settings.modelTierDesc: Model used when generating each scene. Prices are input / output per 1M tokens. Helper tasks (intent classification, memory compression) use separate cheap models and are unaffected.
settings.modelCustomDesc: Pick a specific model from the list
settings.sceneBadgeBudgetDesc: Fast and cheap. Shorter responses, great for testing and long sessions.
settings.sceneBadgeBalancedDesc: Best quality-to-cost ratio for narration and dialogue.
settings.sceneBadgePremiumDesc: Highest-quality narration and dialogue — most expensive, but best at describing the world.
settings.sceneBadgeReasonerDesc: Reasoning model — higher planning quality at the cost of price and longer dialogues.
settings.apiKeysDescription: Keys are read from the server's environment variables. You need at least one AI key (OpenAI or Anthropic) to play.
settings.elevenlabsServerOnly: All keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Stability, Gemini, ElevenLabs, Meshy) are read from the server's environment variables — not from the UI.
settings.sharedVoiceSettingsHint: These voice settings are shared globally for all players connected to the backend.
settings.voiceSelectPlaceholder: Enter API key to load voices
settings.npcVoicePoolDesc: These voices will be auto-assigned to NPCs as they appear in dialogue
settings.voicePickerHint: Click to set narrator voice. Use the group icon to add/remove from NPC pool. Use ♂/♀ to set voice gender.
settings.dialogueSpeedDesc: Speed up or slow down narration and dialogue playback
settings.canvasEffectsDesc: Particles, fog, weather overlays on scenes
settings.itemImagesDesc: Automatic image generation for new inventory items
settings.effectIntensityDesc: Controls particle density, fog opacity, and overall visual effect strength
settings.narratorStyleDesc: Fine-tune the Dungeon Master's writing voice and style
settings.narratorCustomInstructionsDesc: Optional: add your own narration style rules for the DM
settings.narratorCustomInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. fewer tax metaphors, shorter combat descriptions, more NPC dialogue...
settings.poeticismDesc: From dry prose to rich, metaphor-laden narration
settings.grittinessDesc: From lighthearted tone to dark, brutal realism
settings.narratorDetailDesc: Amount of environmental and sensory description
settings.narratorHumorDesc: Amount of humor woven into narration
settings.narratorDramaDesc: From subtle narration to theatrical grandeur
settings.narratorSeriousnessDesc: From silly and goofy to grave and somber mood in generated images
settings.imageStyleDesc: Art style for AI-generated scene images and portraits
settings.darkPaletteDesc: Prefer dark, moody colors in generated images
settings.sfxDesc: AI-generated sound effects via ElevenLabs for impactful moments
settings.sfxEnabledDesc: Generate ambient sounds for combat, magic, and events
settings.sfxVolumeDesc: Volume level for generated sound effects
settings.musicDesc: Background music from local MP3/MP4 files for immersive scene atmosphere
settings.localMusicEnabledDesc: Play pre-uploaded MP3 tracks from the server
settings.localMusicDesc: Background music from pre-uploaded MP3 files on the server. Place MP3 files in backend/public/music/.
settings.musicVolumeDesc: Volume level for background music playback
settings.configBackupDesc: Export or import your full configuration including API keys, DM settings, and campaigns.
settings.exportConfigDesc: Save all settings and campaigns to a JSON file
settings.importConfigDesc: Load settings and campaigns from a JSON file
settings.importSuccess: Configuration imported successfully! Settings have been applied.
settings.importError: Failed to import configuration. Make sure the file is a valid Dungeons & Sillicons backup.
settings.configBackupWarning: The exported file contains your API keys. Keep it safe and do not share it publicly.
settings.backendDesc: Connect to a backend server for media caching, API key management, and cloud storage.
settings.backendPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.cacheStatsDesc: Cached media files on the server

gmModal.title: Game Master
gmModal.emptyGraph: No world data yet — start playing to populate the graph
gmModal.graphHint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom, click nodes for details

worldState.title: World State
worldState.voicePoolMissing: DM Settings is missing voices tagged male or female — voices won't be auto-assigned to new NPCs.

species.HumanDesc: Versatile and adaptive. Bonus to all attributes except luck.
species.HalflingDesc: Small but clever. High charisma and dexterity.
species.DwarfDesc: Tough as nails. High endurance and strength.
species.ElfDesc: Agile and intelligent, with a natural affinity for magic.

charCreator.title: Create Character
charCreator.portraitDesc: Take a photo with your webcam or upload one. AI will transform it into a fantasy portrait while preserving your facial features.
charCreator.portraitNeedsKey: Portrait generation requires a Stability AI API key. Configure it in Settings.
charCreator.portraitNeedsKeyDalle: Portrait generation requires an OpenAI API key. Configure it in Settings.
charCreator.portraitNeedsKeyGemini: Portrait generation requires a Google AI API key. Configure it in Settings.
charCreator.portraitDescGemini: AI will generate a fantasy portrait of your character based on the selected species, gender, and career. You can also add a reference image or webcam photo to preserve facial likeness.
charCreator.portraitDescDalle: AI will generate a fantasy portrait of your character based on the selected species, gender, and career.
charCreator.portraitFiltered: The image was filtered by the AI safety system. Please try with a different photo.
charCreator.cameraError: Could not access camera. Try uploading a photo instead.
charCreator.referencePhotoHintGemini: Without a photo, AI will generate the portrait only from the character description. With a photo, it will try to preserve facial resemblance.
charCreator.portraitDescGptImage: AI will generate a fantasy portrait of your character. You can add a reference photo to preserve your facial likeness in the portrait.
charCreator.referencePhotoHintGptImage: Without a photo, AI will generate the portrait only from the character description. With a photo, it will preserve your face and identity.

characterPicker.title: Your Character
characterPicker.createNewDesc: Generate a fresh character with the AI
characterPicker.useExistingDesc: Select a saved character from your roster
characterPicker.noCharacters: No saved characters yet. Play a campaign first to save characters.
characterPicker.lockedTooltip: This character must be in a safe location (tavern, inn, temple) in campaign "{{campaign}}" before joining another one. {{location}}.
characterPicker.lockedBlockedJoin: The selected character is locked in another campaign. Pick a different one.
characterPicker.legendNoAi: Configure an AI key to generate a legend

system.diceRollMessage: {{skill}} test: d100 roll {{roll}} vs target {{target}} — SL {{sl}} — {{result}}

autoPlayer.title: AI Auto-Player
autoPlayer.customInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. always try to haggle, avoid combat, flirt with NPCs...

multiplayer.backendRequiredDesc: Connect to a backend server in Settings to use multiplayer.
multiplayer.joinSubtitle: Enter the 4-character room code shared by the host.
multiplayer.createOrJoin: Create or join a multiplayer room
multiplayer.waitingForHostStart: Waiting for the host to start the game...
multiplayer.guestSettingsNotice: The host is configuring the campaign settings. You can see changes in real-time.
multiplayer.noPastCharacters: No past characters found. Play a solo campaign first to save characters.
multiplayer.openMultiplayerDesc: Convert this solo campaign to multiplayer so other players can join mid-game.
multiplayer.waitingForPlayers: Waiting for players to submit actions...
multiplayer.soloActionTooltip: Send only your action without waiting for others (3 min cooldown)
multiplayer.noRooms: No rooms available right now. Ask a host to share their code or create your own!

magic.title: Magic
magic.pickSpell: Select a spell from the list.
magic.learnSuccess: Learned successfully! Spell added to your repertoire.

gallery.title: Campaign Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Browse community campaigns — like a workshop library for your next WFRP tale.
gallery.emptyHint: Check back later, or verify the /campaigns/public API is available.
gallery.noScenesReplay: No scenes to replay for this listing.

webcam.cameraError: Could not access camera. Please check permissions.
webcam.cameraErrorInsecureContext: Camera access requires a secure context (HTTPS or localhost).
webcam.cameraErrorUnsupported: This browser does not support camera access.
webcam.cameraErrorPermissionDenied: Camera or microphone permission was denied. Allow access in browser settings.
webcam.cameraErrorDeviceNotFound: No camera or microphone device was found.
webcam.cameraErrorDeviceInUse: Camera or microphone is already in use by another application.
webcam.hint: Your camera and microphone will be shared with other players in the room.

viewer.notFound: Campaign not found or link has expired
viewer.backendRequired: Backend connection required to view shared campaigns

trade.title: Trade
trade.haggleFail: Merchant refuses to lower the price
trade.emptyShop: This merchant has nothing for sale

alchemy.title: Alchemy
alchemy.criticalSuccess: Critical success! Double yield and enhanced effect!
